description: Refactor /hyperopen/src/hyperopen/funding/actions.cljs and /hyperopen/src/hyperopen/funding/effects.cljs into explicit domain, application, and infrastructure boundaries while preserving runtime action/effect contracts and funding modal behavior.
notes: Implemented first refactor slice: funding.actions is now a facade over funding.application.modal-actions; extracted lifecycle normalization to funding.domain.lifecycle; extracted HyperUnit request/fallback client to funding.infrastructure.hyperunit-client; funding.effects now consumes domain/infrastructure seams. Required gates currently pass (npm run check, npm test, npm run test:websocket). Remaining: split modal view-model/action orchestration and effects submit/polling orchestration into smaller application modules.
title: Funding bounded-context split (domain/application/infrastructure)
